title: lastrea paleata
intro: Lastrea paleata, also known as the Pale-leaved Lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea paleata include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing irritated skin, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Lastrea paleata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
